5 ضربات تربك حسابات توروب قبل مواجهة الأهلي أمام المصري.. ماذا حدث؟
content: يواجه فريق الكرة الأول بالنادي الأهلي، خطر فقدان عدد كبير من لاعبيه قبل مواجهة الحسم أمام المصري البورسعيدي في الدوري الممتاز إذ يوجد 5 لاعبين مهددين بالغياب، بسبب الإصابات المختلفة التي طالتهم في الفترة الماضية. يتم التصفح الآن.. بعد 72 ساعة.. الأهلي يودع هؤلاء رسميًا بفرمان عبد الحفيظ وياسين منصور رحيل رباعي الأهلي بشكل رسمي عقب مواجهة المصري البورسعيدي.. تابع الأسماء إمام عاشور يؤدب أدم وطني بخطوة قوية.. وتطورات ضم أكرم توفيق وعبد المنعم إدارة الأهلي تبحث مصير أحدث الصفقات المحلية للرحيل النهائي.. تفاصيل نارية ويدخل الأهلي معسكرًا مغلقًا اليوم الاثنين، استعدادًا لمواجهة فريق المصري البورسعيدي، المقرر إقامتها بعد غد الأربعاء، ضمن مباريات الجولة الأخيرة من مرحلة التتويج ببطولة الدوري. ويختار الجهاز الفني عقب مران اليوم، قائمة اللاعبين التي ستخوض مواجهة المصري، في ظل معاناة 5 نجوم من الإصابات المختلفة إذ اشتكى حسين الشحات من آلام في الكتف، بينما يعاني إمام عاشور من كدمة في الركبة. وتعرض أحمد رمضان بيكهام للإصابة في العضلة الضامة، وشارك بشكل تدريجي في التدريبات الجماعية، لكن لم يحسم مصيره النهائي بينما أنهى كريم فؤاد ويوسف بلعمري برنامجهما التأهيلي للتعافي من الإصابة، التي أبعدتهما عن المباريات الأخيرة للفريق، إلا أن موقفهما النهائي لم يحسم حتى الآن. يتم التصفح الآن.. تحت أنظار الأهلي.. المشاكل الـ4 تشتعل داخل الزمالك أحمد شوبير يكشف عن أسوأ صفقة في الأهلي ويلقي اللوم على هؤلاء! عاجل.. نقل ييس توروب إلى المستشفى والمدير الفني في حالة حرجة توروب يحتار في حسم موقف الثنائي الأهم أمام المصري ويستعد الأهلي لمباراة المصري، التي من المقرر أن تجمع الفريقين يوم الأربعاء المقبل، على ملعب الجيش بمدينة برج العرب في الإسكندرية، بختام منافسات بطولة الدوري الممتاز. The post 5 ضربات تربك حسابات توروب قبل مواجهة الأهلي أمام المصري.. ماذا حدث؟ appeared first on الأهلي نيوز .

content: 主催者から一言 ポイント 海老名出会い飲み会 婚活や恋活、趣味活に繋がる為の新しい出会いの場を提供しております。 男女比率を調整しながら募集をしております。 ◆参加費にコース料理+飲み放題代は含まれます。 ◆完全着席型で、普通の合コンのような感じです。 ◆席替えは2回の予定でおりますので、ゆっくりお話しすることができます。 少人数開催の場合席替えがない場合もございます。 ◆スタートから終わりまで、スタッフも同行しますので、一人参加の方や初参加の方も安心だと思います。 ◆カップリング・プロフィールカードの記入はございません。 連絡先交換は自由となっておりますので気に入った方がおりましたら連絡先を交換しておいてください。 コース料理+飲み放題 掘りごたつ席になります。 コース料理 ・枝豆 ・彩り野菜のシーザーサラダ ・比叡生湯葉入り御造り二種 ・つくね串炙り焼 ・ナゲット&ポテト ・三元豚と彩り野菜の蒸ししゃぶ ・デザート 飲み放題 生ビール、ハイボール、ソフトドリンクなど ナビスタとは ◆ナビスタは8年目、札幌・静岡・東京・千葉・埼玉・神奈川で開催 ◆週刊SPA!2024年2/6号で「シニアの出会い」最前線の特集記事で1ページ ナビスタが掲載されました。 ◆1名様でご参加頂くお客様も毎回多数いらっしゃいます。 ほとんどの方が1名参加となりますので、1名でも気軽にご参加ください。 ◆男女比調整について ・男女半々の保証はしておりませんが、男女半々位になるよう調整はしております。 ・受け付けた場合でも、直前まで人数変動しますので、男女比調整で参加をお断りする場合もございます。 ◆ノーバッティングシステム ・参加したいのですが会いたくない人が居てまた会うのか不安 ・いろいろなパーティに参加していて、会いたくない人がいる ・会社の人と会いたくない 上記の相談は増えておりますので、 相手にわからないように調整させて頂いておりますので気軽にご相談ください。 ※ただし、開催直前では調整できない場合もございますので、開催1週間前までにご連絡頂ければありがたいです。 最大人数・最少人数・開催について ◆最少開催人数 男性2名・女性2名になります。 ◆最大募集人数 男性10名・女性10名になります。 ※但し、企画により変動する場合がございます。 ◆開催人数につきましては、前月20人集まった企画でも、翌月6人くらいしか集まらないこともあり、集まり方は運営側も予測できない部分はございます。 楽しい会かどうかは、参加人数より、その時に参加される方の相性や人柄など要素が大きいです。 結局は、運次第のところはございます。 ◆最少催行人数に満たない場合は、開催前日23時までに最少催行人数に届かなかった場合は開催中止とさせていただきます。 また天候や状況などにより中止されることがございます。 ◆中止判断タイミングは開始前日の23時となりますが、申込者の直前のキャンセルにより、直前でも中止になる場合もございます。 中止時も交通費など保証はございません。 ◆ご予約の操作と同時に上述の注意事項に同意したものと致します。 お申し込み状況 受付開始 時間厳守でお願いいたします。 遅れる場合はご連絡ください。 イベントスタート! 全員で乾杯を行います。 席替え 席替えは3回の予定ですが、参加人数によっては席替えの回数変わります 男性が移動致します。 イベント終了 本日の出会いをこれからも大切にしていただけたら嬉しいです。 連絡先交換自由となっております。

D&D becomes a true space opera with Neon Odyssey
content: The most radical thing about Avantris Entertainment’s new Kickstarter campaign isn’t that it’s a sprawling sci-fi Dungeons & Dragons campaign set in space. Everyone keeps trying to put D&D into sci-fi. Neon Odyssey isn’t just selling elves in starships or Cowboy Bebop vibes. It’s selling optimism and nostalgia, along with a pulsing synthwave soundtrack, in what’s ostensibly a neon-drenched hopepunk space opera.

Eid Relief: Govt orders Early Salary Release for Employees by May 20
content: PESHAWAR – Eid-ul-Azha 2026 is around the corner, and there is good news for government employees as salaries are set to be released earlier than usual. In a relief move ahead of the festive season, authorities decided to issue May salaries around 10 days in advance, allowing employees to prepare for Eid celebrations without financial stress. The government of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa announced that government employees will receive their salaries earlier than scheduled, with payments set to begin from May 20. The decision was taken on special instructions of Chief Minister Sohail Afridi, directing authorities to ensure timely disbursement of salaries so that public sector employees can prepare for Eid without financial stress. Finance Advisor confirmed that the move has been made specifically in view of the upcoming Eid-ul-Adha celebrations, stressing that the government is prioritizing ease and convenience for employees during the festive season. Eid-ul-Azha is expected to be observed across Pakistan on May 27, after the moon of Zil Hajj was sighted in the country a day earlier. The sighting has officially set the stage for nationwide religious celebrations marked by sacrifice, gatherings, and festivities. With just days left until Eid, the early salary release is being seen as a significant financial relief measure for thousands of government employees across the province. Market Timings Reset Provincial governments in Punjab and Sindh temporarily extended market timings ahead of Eid-ul-Azha, allowing shops to stay open late into the evening. This decision has been welcomed by traders who were struggling under earlier restrictions that required markets in major cities like Lahore, Karachi, and Rawalpindi to close around 8 pm due to energy-saving policies. Business owners said the early closing hours badly affected sales, especially because Pakistan’s retail activity largely depends on evening and night-time shopping, particularly during festive seasons. They estimate that these restrictions led to significant losses, as most customers prefer visiting markets after dinner. The extension comes at a time when the economy is already under pressure from rising fuel prices, inflation, and regional tensions that have increased transport and logistics costs. These factors have also pushed up prices of everyday goods and Eid-related items, including clothing and sacrificial animals. In livestock markets, prices increased sharply compared to last year, making it...

Transfer-Duell um Eichhorn: Bayern und BVB in der Pole Position
content: Der FC Bayern bleibt auf der Suche nach den größten Nachwuchstalenten Europas weiter aktiv. Nun verdichten sich die Hinweise, dass die Münchner bei Hertha-Juwel Kennet Eichhorn ernst machen könnten – doch die Konkurrenz ist groß. Der erst 16 Jahre alte Mittelfeldspieler von Hertha BSC zählt aktuell zu den begehrtesten Talenten Deutschlands. Wie der italienische Transfer-Experte Gianluca Di Marzio berichtet, ist vor allem Borussia Dortmund und der FC Bayern in der Pole Position im Rennen um Eichhorn. „Natürlich“ hätten in der Bundesliga vor allem diese beiden Klubs die Möglichkeiten, das Berliner Top-Talent zu verpflichten, so Di Marzio. Zweifel an Manchester City Zuletzt war auch Manchester City intensiv mit Eichhorn in Verbindung gebracht worden . Mehrere Medien hatten berichtet, dass die Engländer den Youngster verpflichten und anschließend für ein weiteres Jahr nach Leverkusen verleihen könnten. Di Marzio äußerte daran jedoch Zweifel. Hintergrund sei die unklare Trainersituation bei City. Dort wird weiterhin spekuliert, dass Enzo Maresca langfristig Pep Guardiola beerben könnte. „Ich bin mir nicht sicher, ob sie einen so jungen Spieler wie ihn verpflichten wollen“, erklärte der Italiener. Damit könnten sich für Bayern und Dortmund neue Möglichkeiten ergeben. Vor allem der BVB gilt seit Jahren als einer der aggressivsten Klubs Europas im Werben um deutsche Top-Talente. Doch auch der FC Bayern hat seine Strategie in diesem Bereich zuletzt deutlich intensiviert. Mit Spielern wie Lennart Karl oder Noel Aseko investieren die Münchner verstärkt in entwicklungsfähige Talente für die Zukunft. Eichhorn würde perfekt in dieses Profil passen. Auch Leverkusen mischt mit Foto: IMAGO Komplett offen scheint der Poker dennoch zu sein. Übereinstimmenden Berichten zufolge rechnet sich auch Bayer Leverkusen weiterhin Chancen aus. Der kicker berichtete zuletzt allerdings, dass die Werkself Eichhorn lieber unabhängig von Manchester City verpflichten möchte. Klar ist: Der Markt für deutsche Top-Talente wird immer umkämpfter. Besonders interessant: Borussia Dortmund hat sein Interesse an Eichhorn bereits öffentlich bestätigt. BVB-Sportdirektor Ole Book sprach im Rahmen einer Medienrunde offen über die Personalie. Beim FC Bayern dagegen äußerte man sich bislang nicht öffentlich zu den Spekulationen. Intern soll Eichhorn allerdings schon länger beobachtet werden. Noch ist offen, wann der 16-Jährige seine endgültige Entscheidung treffen wird....

Pakistan Sends New Iranian Peace Proposal to US
content: Iran sent a new peace proposal to the United States with terms that appeared similar to offers Washington has previously rejected, although a senior Iranian official told Reuters on Monday that the U.S. had softened positions on some issues. A Pakistani source confirmed that Islamabad, which has conveyed messages between the sides in the war in the Middle East since hosting the only round of peace talks last month, had shared the latest proposal with Washington. But the source suggested progress had been difficult. The sides “keep changing their goalposts,” the Pakistani source said, adding: “We don’t have much time.” Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei confirmed that Tehran’s views had been “conveyed to the American side through Pakistan” but gave no details. Washington did not immediately comment. The Iranian proposal, as described by the senior Iranian source, appeared similar in many respects to Iran’s previous offer, which U.S. President Donald Trump rejected last week as “garbage”. It would focus first on securing an end to the war, reopening the Strait of Hormuz – a major oil supply route that Iran has effectively blockaded – and lifting maritime sanctions. Contentious issues around Iran’s nuclear program and uranium enrichment would be deferred to later rounds of talks, the source said. However, in an apparent softening of Washington’s stance, the senior Iranian source said the United States had agreed to release a quarter of Iran’s frozen funds – totaling tens of billions of dollars – held in foreign banks. Iran wants all the assets released. The Iranian source also said Washington had shown more flexibility in agreeing to let Iran continue some peaceful nuclear activity under supervision of the International Atomic Energy Agency. Iran’s Tasnim news agency separately quoted an unidentified source as saying the U.S. had agreed to waive oil sanctions on Iran while negotiations were under way. Iranian officials did not immediately comment on Tasnim’s report, which a U.S. official, who declined to be named, said was false. Fragile Ceasefire A fragile ceasefire is in place after six weeks of war that followed U.S.-Israeli airstrikes on Iran. But talks mediated by Pakistan have stalled and Trump has said the ceasefire is “on life support”. Washington has previously demanded Tehran dismantle its nuclear program and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, which normally carries one-fifth of the world’s seaborne oil and liquefied natural gas...

Victoria Council to discuss changes to distributing HOT funds
content: The Victoria City Council will meet on Tuesday, voting on a variety of issues and hearing two presentations. Director of Conventions and Visitors Bureau (CVB) Joel Novosad will present how the CVB is making changes to its Hotel Occupancy Tax (HOT) award program. The agenda item memo states that in 2025, 18 businesses were awarded funds from the HOT Fund. At April’s meeting with the Subcommittee of the Tourism Advisory Board, it was noted that the committee and Novosad wanted to make changes to its funding awards program, and a discussion was held. “At this workshop, the subcommittee reached a consensus on changes to the program, presented here, that would establish a maximum award amount and a minimum requirement of hotel room nights for certain applicants, as well as revising how award amounts are calculated for certain applicants,” the agenda item memo said. During Tuesday’s meeting, Novosad will present the findings to the council during the city manager reports portion of the meeting, making changes to the program before funds are distributed in 2026. In the consent agenda, the council will receive an easement of land from property owners with the help of the Texas Land & Right-of-Way Company, for the purpose of paving, drainage, utility, and sidewalk improvements. The easements are located at North Street from Ben Jordan Street to Ben Wilson Street. This area surrounds the Gary Moses Community Center, which will soon undergo renovations. Part of the Community Center renovation is road improvements to North Street. The easements will cost the city $30,200, bringing the total contract amount to $302,000. According to the agenda item memo, funds for these easements will come from the Water Utility Fund. Also in the consent agenda, council will vote to relieve Palestine Missionary Baptist Church of all fines and fees that it owes. Located at 900 South Cameron Street, city staff states that the building has nearly $22,000 in owed fees due to code violations, all from before the building was donated to the church in 2018. “Palestine Missionary Baptist Church was deeded the property at 900 S. Cameron as a gift in 2018, prior to which several thousand dollars in liens had been filed against the property for abatement of code violations,” according to the agenda item memo. “It has been determined that bills for these liens were sent to an incorrect address in Oklahoma associated with the prior owner, which prevented the Church from being aware of their...

Long-Range Night Vision with an Infrared Laser
content: Most consumer-grade night vision devices are basically a standard camera without the usual filter to block near infrared (NIR) light, which are then paired with a NIR light source that’s not visible to the human eye. Unlike the passive night vision provided by a photomultiplier tube, these can’t resolve objects beyond the beam of their illumination source. On the other hand, if, as [Project 326] did , you use an infrared laser to illuminate the scene, you can still get a very long range out of these devices. [Project 326]’s device consists of a previously-built reflecting telescope focusing a distant scene in to a webcam with the infrared filter removed, with the infrared laser illuminating the scene. Finding a suitable laser took some effort: the first option, a secondhand fiber-coupled industrial laser, was accidentally over-volted and destroyed during testing. The second had a fiber output which proved extremely hard to terminate, and a third laser couldn’t be collimated correctly. The final laser was a Vertical-Cavity Surface-Emitting Laser (VSEL) diode array element driven at about two Watts and collimated by a small lens. This illumination setup is safe at a long range, but only at a long range. The laser was strong enough to burn cardboard at close range, but out at about 500 meters, the beam had spread until it was less than a hundredth of the standard safety limit. To make sure that nothing else would get in the way of the beam, it was shone down from the top of a tall building. Testing with a power meter also showed that at a long range, the beam was weaker than expected. It turned out that the wavelength used (940 nm) is attenuated by water vapor, to the point that up to 70% of the beam’s strength was lost before reaching the target. Despite this, and despite a rather linear beam profile, a somewhat dark image was still visible at 650 meters. If you’re looking for a somewhat more versatile long-range night vision device, check out one based on a photomultiplier tube . Another approach is to use a very high-sensitivity camera . Thanks to [Keith Olson] for the tip!

Justin Herbert’s secret weapon: The speed shortcut no one saw coming
content: Justin Herbert, Mike McDaniel and the Chargers’ plans for the next stage of the quarterback development McDaniel has spoken about wanting Herbert to fully take control of the role. That comment seems to be focused on the mental side of his game, rather than any physical skills. The Chargers aren’t looking to change how he throws – it’s more about how quickly he processes things on the field. Herbert already ranks among the top quarterbacks in the NFL when it comes to arm strength, accuracy outside the numbers and toughness in the pocket. The Chargers are not overhauling a struggling player. They are trying to make an already gifted one more efficient on snaps that decide postseason outcomes. That distinction matters because McDaniel is not talking about a total rebuild. He is talking about shaving wasted time off a great player’s process. Photo by Michael Owens/Getty Images 2025 stats make the change clear Herbert’s average time to throw was 2.90 seconds last season, 11th slowest among qualifying passers. He also ranked third in pressure rate at 43.3 per cent, third in sacks with 54 and first in total pressures absorbed with 268. Part of that was due to a struggling offensive line, but it’s still telling. Herbert often let plays extend long enough for pressure to become a factor, which is exactly what McDaniel wants to address. The risk with someone as talented as Herbert is leaning into his ability to extend every snap into something bigger. But McDaniel appears focused on getting him into a faster rhythm, with sharper footwork and quicker decisions, rather than just scaling back the offence. There’s an important distinction there. Herbert doesn’t need to play it safe more often – he needs to react more quickly when the big play isn’t available right away. How Los Angeles’s recent postseason results raise the stakes The Chargers have managed just 15 points across their last two wild-card defeats. That context sets the tone for this offseason, highlighting why McDaniel’s role is so significant. Los Angeles can’t keep relying on Herbert’s ability to mask every offensive flaw. Defences in the playoffs aren’t forgiving. They make quarterbacks stick to the schedule, and any hesitation is quickly exploited. If Herbert is going to help this team move past its underachieving label, he needs to start winning more plays before the pressure even gets there. Quarterback growth does not always mean adding new tricks. Sometimes it means removing unnecessary friction....

'Bluey' regresa esta misma semana con nuevos minisodios
content: Otros pueden intentarlo , verbigracia La patrulla canina y su spin-off, que además acaban de ser renovados por 2 temporadas más cada uno , y a fe de los más pequeños de la casa que se acercan, pero por ahora nadie iguala el carisma de la pequeña perra pastor australiana Bluey y el resto de su familia. Lo saben los infantes que revolotean en casa a nuestro alrededor y lo sabemos los mayores que tenemos que entretenerlos cada corto periodo de tiempo, y si es con dibujos animados que además traen consigo pequeñas lecciones de vida y otras enseñanzas , mejor que mejor. 'Bluey' puede verse en Disney+ No tan nuevos, pero sí bienvenidos Bluey no necesita presentación pero sí que adolece de nuevos episodios pues la última temporada de la serie, la tercera, terminó de emitirse en abril de 2024. Y aunque más adelante ha contado con especiales e incluso con una obra de teatro , ya disponible en Disney+, no termina de ser lo mismo, pero por fortuna pronto tendrá solución . A medias , cierto es, pues Bluey Cortos temporada 2, que es lo que nos espera a partir del próximo día 20 de mayo en la plataforma de streaming, no es sino la localización y adición a la plataforma de vídeo de Disney de unos minisodios que ya se han podido ver en Australia y también en el canal oficial del estudio Ludo en YouTube. Sin embargo y aunque no sea material completamente inédito , para la inmensa mayoría de familias fuera del país del hemisferio Sur supondrá el primer contacto con estos episodios. Entre los títulos confirmados se encuentran Humpty Dumpty , Green Bottles , Flying Saucer , Tea Party , Pea Pod Sausages o Cinderella , entre otros. Pequeñas píldoras de humor, ternura y caos familiar que mantienen intacta la esencia de la serie. Suscribirse a Disney+ En España ya contábamos con 24 cortos previos , por lo que estos 10 elevarán considerablemente el catálogo disponible. Mientras esperamos (con algo de impaciencia) la temporada 4, o al menos alguna noticia sobre la misma, estos 10 minisodios son un chute de alegría azul que llega justo a tiempo.

Manchester United fans name 'colossus' as Man of the Match vs Nottingham Forest with 63% of votes
content: There were several standout performers as Manchester United beat Nottingham Forest at Old Trafford. Sunday’s 3-2 victory over Nottingham Forest will mostly be remembered as Casemiro’s farewell match at the Theatre of Dreams before his contract expires in the summer. But there were other storylines within the match, including Bruno Fernandes equalling the assist record and Bryan Mbeumo and Matheus Cunha scoring their 10th goals of the season in their debut campaigns. There were plenty of players to choose from in the Man of the Match poll, but United fans on TalkingPoints agreed on their winner. Photo by Ash Donelon/Manchester United via Getty Images Man United Man of the Match vs Nottingham Forest Via TalkingPoints , over 1,000 fans voted on their Man of the Match performance and it was (perhaps unsurprisingly) Bruno Fernandes who came out on top. Fernandes earned 63% of the vote, crowning him as United’s best player on the same day he matched the assist record. Goalscorer Matheus Cunha finished second in the poll with just over 10% of the vote, while Lisandro Martinez also earned a podium position with 7% of votes. One reader on TalkingPoints described Fernandes as a “colossus” for United: “Bruno by a country mile. He was a provider fantastic, a real colossus, with a monstrous workrate.” Other readers described his performance as “excellent” and “amazing” with others pointing out the significance of his 20th assist of the season. Bruno Fernandes is one game away from history Having equalled the Premier League assist record, Fernandes now has one game remaining in 2025/26 to eclipse Thierry Henry and Kevin De Bruyne’s tally. Not only is Fernandes playing for the assist record, but one final strong performance against Brighton next week would solidify his push for the Premier League Player of the Year award . READ MORE: Bruno Fernandes already has 21 assists this season but he hasn’t broken the record yet, here’s why Fernandes is a frontrunner for POTY, but he is facing competition from Arsenal duo Declan Rice and David Raya. Fernandes has already won the FWA Footballer of the Year award, and now he is looking to expand his trophy cabinet even more.

Sunday farmers market launches in downtown Parksville May 31
content: The folks at the McMillan Arts Centre Community Garden are launching a new Sunday Farmers Market in downtown Parksville this spring. Opening day is scheduled for May 31, with hours from 9:30 a.m. to 1 p.m., according to a news release by the MAC. The market will be located outside the arts centre at 133 McMillan St. The focus will be mainly on farmers, bakers and other food producers for the time being. The market will be anchored by Rooted Shores Farm, a community-driven sustainable farm project based in Snaw-naw-was, who will be bringing their eggs, broiler chickens, farm raised produce and CSA boxes. Other farms and food producers, including the MAC Community Garden itself, will have local produce, baked goods and other products on offer. They’ll be joined periodically through the summer by members of the Qualicum Beach Master Gardeners group, who will bring their expert plant knowledge to the Community Garden venue for workshops and Q&As. Food trucks and musicians will also contribute to the community vibe. Small backyard producers are encouraged to grow extra, and distribute their produce, with or without a booth of their own, through the group’s Community Harvest Collective. The ultimate goal is to increase the availability of local farm and food products to Parksville and increase the opportunities for local farmers to get their products to market. RELATED: New community garden off to great start in Parksville

content: The California State Athletic Commission has released the full fight night weight figures. Khamzat Chimaev’s weight cut became a huge talking point after he lost his UFC middleweight title and undefeated record on May 9. Fortunately for Most Valuable Promotions , nothing similar occurred ahead of their first foray into putting on MMA events. While he’s not known for being an especially big welterweight, Nate Diaz, who weighed the lowest he has in a decade for his return to the cage, put on 16 pounds by the time he made the walk at the Intuit Dome. LATEST NEWS: Ronda Rousey’s return drew over 2,000 fewer fans than UFC’s last Intuit Dome card in attendance report Nate Diaz gaining 16 pounds by fight night overshadowed by Namo Fazil’s huge 27 pound jump On Monday, MMA Fighting reported the full list of fight night weights that were released by the California State Athletic Commission. Not every commission chooses to release figures like this but CSAC go through this process in order to try and prevent fighters from risking their health in huge cuts. This didn’t prevent Nate Diaz from gaining 16 pounds between his weigh-in and fight night, though he had only the third biggest gain out of the fighters on the card. While Jefferson Creighton only put on 0.4 pounds more than Diaz, Namo Fazil climbed a staggering 27.2 pounds after stepping on the scales for his welterweight bout. IPL 2026: Ishan Kishan’s 70-run knock over CSK guides SRH and GT to playoffs
content: The match no. 63 of the Indian Premier League (IPL) 2026, was played between Ruturaj Gaikwad’s Chennai Super Kings (CSK) and Pat Cummins’ Sunrisers Hyderabad (SRH) at the MA Chidambaram Stadium, Chennai. Where Sunrisers Hyderabad defeated Chennai Super Kings by 6 wickets. Sunrisers Hyderabad (Playing XI): Abhishek Sharma, Ishan Kishan(w), Heinrich Klaasen, Salil Arora, Smaran Ravichandran, Nitish Kumar Reddy, Pat Cummins(c), Shivang Kumar, Eshan Malinga, Sakib Hussain, Praful Hinge Chennai Super Kings (Playing XI): Sanju Samson(w), Ruturaj Gaikwad(c), Urvil Patel, Kartik Sharma, Dewald Brevis, Shivam Dube, Prashant Veer, Akeal Hosein, Noor Ahmad, Anshul Kamboj, Spencer Johnson Also Read: Big blow for CSK fans as MS Dhoni is unavailable for the final game at Chepauk vs SRH Sanju Samson and Dewald Brevis help CSK post 180 against SRH Chennai Super Kings (CSK) had won the toss and decided to bat first, for CSK, Sanju Samson and Ruturaj Gaikwad opened the innings. CSK got a good start as Sanju Samson started playing some good shots and continued his impressive form. Samson produced an innings of 27 runs off 13 balls, including five fours and one six. Meanwhile, Gaikwad scored 15 runs off 21 balls. Chennai Super Kings faced trouble in the match as their batters started losing their wickets. However, Kartik Sharma and Dewald Brevis took charge in their hands. Kartik Sharma scored 32 runs off 19 balls, including three fours and two sixes at a strike rate of 168. Meanwhile, Brevis scored 44 runs off 27 balls, including two fours and four sixes. At the end, Shivam Dube contributed his 26 runs off 23 balls, including three fours and one six. With this batting performance, CSK added 180 runs on the board. Pat Cummins and Sakib Hussain were the star bowlers for Sunrisers Hyderabad as Pat Cummins took three important wickets in this crucial match. Meanwhile, Sakib Hussain removed two batters. This victory helped them to move one step closer to the qualification race. Ishan Kishan and Heinrich Klaasen power SRH to crucial win over CSK Speaking about Sunrisers Hyderabad chasing performance against Chennai Super Kings, Abhishek Sharma and Travis Head began the innings for SRH. Travis Head departed early in the match for 6 runs off 6 balls. On the other hand, his partner Abhishek Sharma struggled against the CSK bowling attack as he scored 26 runs off 21 balls, including three fours and one six. Drake Accused of Ripping Off a Beat From Another Rapper for His New Album: ‘You Got Me F***ed Up’
content: Rapper 1900Rugrat has accused Drake of ripping off one of his beats. The track is titled “Little Birdie”. In an Instagram video, Rugrat claims the song’s beat is based on—or taken from—the one he produced for the intro to his debut 2025 album, Porch 2 The Pent . Recounting his side of the story, 1900Rugrat speaks directly to Drake first, saying, “You got me f**ked up.” He then alleges that the Toronto rapper previously reached out to him to work on a project. When Rugrat sent over some tracks, it was his album intro beat that Drake “took a liking to.” Rugrat says that he declined, but that Drake still implied he was going to include the Florida lyricist on his album. However, Drake “never sent the verse,” which Rugrat was unbothered by, until he heard the new album, Iceman . “Twin, that’s the only beat I’ve ever produced,” 1900 Rugrat said. He added, “Don’t rip my s**t and repitch it like that, fam. That’s fried out and f**ked up, twin.” View this post on Instagram It is worth noting that Rugrat later came back with some receipts, posting screenshots of his messages with Drake. In a follow-up post, he shared alleged DMs between the two of them, wherein Drake wrote, “I know the tape bout to go f**king nuts.” He added, “Hopefully we can get one for the album. I talked to Gordo he told me the other s**t was the intro.” Drake went on to write, “I was hype off that s**t but I know that feeling when you already done.” He finally offered, “So we’ll cook up if anything.” Drake’s new album, ‘Iceman’, was accompanied by two more albums: ‘Maid of Honour’ and ‘Habibti’ In response, Rugrat wrote back, “whaaaaa i appreciate u understanding brudda i just know i cant ever say those lyrics again n this my first ever tape so it was special for me yk, more than appreciative...” At this point, the message trails off. It’s unclear how this might shake out, but “Little Birdie” is credited to producers 40, DJ Frisco954, and RL. At this point, it appears that neither Drake nor his team has commented on 1900Rugrat’s accusations. The post Drake Accused of Ripping Off a Beat From Another Rapper for His New Album: ‘You Got Me F***ed Up’ appeared first on VICE .

Adolescente de 15 anos é encontrado morto em pousada de Geribá, em Búzios
content: Búzios - Um adolescente argentino de 15 anos foi encontrado morto na noite deste domingo (18), em uma pousada no bairro de Geribá, em Armação dos Búzios. Segundo a Polícia Militar, o jovem morava no município e não estava na cidade como turista. De acordo com a ocorrência, policiais foram acionados para a ocorrência e quando chegaram ao local, uma equipe do Corpo de Bombeiros já realizava o atendimento. A área foi isolada para o trabalho da perícia criminal. Durante a ocorrência, o pai do adolescente esteve na pousada e apresentava forte abalo emocional, segundo o registro policial. Após os procedimentos periciais, o caso foi registrado na 127a Delegacia de Polícia (127a DP). As circunstâncias da morte ainda não foram esclarecidas oficialmente. A Polícia Civil investiga o caso.

18-jarige Brit Henry Nowak bloedt door politie geboeid dood, want moordenaar (sikh) met op straat toegestaan ceremonieel mes van 21 cm beschuldigde hem van racisme
content: De laatste beelden van Henry in leven Social Erger en minder ambigue dan 1.000 George Floyds, maar het slachtoffer staat aan het ontvangende eind van dekoloniaal discourse, dus geen staatsbegrafenis met gouden grafkist en geen knielende Starmer voor de 18-jarige Brits-Poolse boekhoud- en economiestudent Henry Nowak. De moord vond afgelopen 3 december plaats en excentriekeling Enoch Powell had het ondanks z'n dichtkunst niet kunnen bedenken. De BBC schrijft dat volgens de Britse aanklager Henry het moment filmde dat hij 23-jarige dader Vickrum Digwa ontmoette, en dat de dader een geholsterd, ceremonieel sikh-mes van 21 centimeter (een ' shastar ' geheten in het Punjaabs) zichtbaar over zijn kleding heen droeg. Vervolgens ontstond er een schermutseling waar geen getuigen van zijn, " maar buren hoorden Nowak zeggen dat hij was neergestoken en op sterven lag, voordat hij probeerde te ontsnappen door over een hek te klimmen. " Daarna, aldus de aanklager, zocht de dader " geen hulp voor de man die hij met zijn forse mes had verwond, maar beschuldigde hem in plaats daarvan van racisme en dronkenschap. " En sorry dat het even duurde, maar hier begint de Werkelijke Waanzin, want vervolgens boeide de politie het neergestoken slachtoffer wegens die aantijging van racisme, en bloedde hij in die hoedanigheid dood: " De politie boeide Nowak aanvankelijk en begon hem eerste hulp te verlenen, waarna hij in elkaar zakte. Kort daarna raakte Henry bewusteloos. De politie begon hem eerste hulp te verlenen en een ambulance te bellen. Een arts werd per helikopter ingevlogen, maar er kon niets meer gedaan worden om Henry te redden en hij werd dood verklaard. " En de dader? Die blijft zich beroepen zich ook in de rechtszaal beroepen op dat hij " racistisch bejegend werd en uit zelfverdediging handelde ", terwijl hij tegelijkertijd ontkent het mes op zak gehad te hebben of de moord te hebben gepleegd. Opmerkelijk weetje: inheemse Britten worden al gearresteerd als ze een botermesje meenemen naar de picknick, maar sikhs zijn onder 'religieuze uitzonderingen' doodleuk toegestaan 'ceremoniële' messen van 21 cm lang op straat bij zich te dragen. Moet wel opgemerkt worden: sikhs hebben niet dezelfde theologisch/doctrinair verankerde vijandigheid tegen gastsamenlevingen als, zeg, MOSLIMS, maar toch. Jonge Henry is niet meer Volstrekt ongerelateerde docu! Social

Hikoiletko kerrostalossa kesäisin? Asunto viilenee näillä keinoilla
content: Moni kerrostaloasukas herää asunnon viilentämiseen vasta silloin, kun kesän helteet ovat jo päällä. Kiinteistöliiton kyselyn mukaan asunnon kuumuus on kuitenkin yleinen ongelma, sillä lähes 70 prosenttia taloyhtiöiden edustajista myöntää lämpötilojen olevan kesäisin liian korkeita. Loppuvuodesta 2025 toteutettuun kyselyyn vastasi yli 2800 taloyhtiön hallituksen jäsentä, joista suurin osa oli puheenjohtajia. Koneelliset viilennysratkaisut ovat suomalaisissa kerrostaloissa edelleen harvinaisuutta. Erityisesti painovoimaisen ilmanvaihdon taloissa kärsitään sisäilman laatuongelmista, kuten seisovasta ilmasta, tunkkaisuudesta ja korkeasta kosteudesta. Tehokkain ja suosituin tapa tuoda säädettävää viileyttä kerrostalokotiin on asuntokohtainen ilmalämpöpumppu. Vaikka laitteet ovat toistaiseksi yleisempiä rivitaloissa, niiden suosio kerrostaloissa kasvaa. Osakkaan on kuitenkin muistettava, ettei pumppua saa asentaa omin luvin. Ennen hankintaa taloyhtiölle on tehtävä virallinen muutostyöilmoitus. Prosessi sujuu helpoimmin, jos taloyhtiö on jo yhtiökokouksessa laatinut selkeät yhteiset pelisäännöt sille, miten ja mihin laitteen ulkoyksikön saa asentaa esimerkiksi parvekkeelle. Viilennykseen ei aina tarvita uusia koneita, vaan apu voi löytyä jo olemassa olevan järjestelmän optimoinnista tai perinteisistä remonteista. Jos taloyhtiöön on suunnitteilla ikkunaremontti, lämpöongelmia voidaan ehkäistä tehokkaasti valitsemalla uusiin ikkunoihin aurinkosuojalasit, jotka estävät aurinkoa kuumentamasta asuntoa. Tärkeää on myös varmistaa, että taloyhtiössä jo olevasta ilmanvaihtojärjestelmästä on pidetty asianmukaisesti huolta. – Ilmanvaihtojärjestelmän puhdistus ja säätö tulisi tehdä tyypillisesti 5–10 vuoden välein, Kiinteistöliiton energia- ja ilmastoasioiden johtava asiantuntija Petri Pylsy muistuttaa tiedotteessa. Pylsyn mukaan myös uudisrakentamisen energiatehokkuusvaatimusten valmistelussa on tärkeää vaatia rakentajia kiinnittämään huomattavasti nykyistä enemmän huomiota hellekesiin, kun he suunnittelevat rakennusten energia- ja talotekniikkaratkaisuja. Vanhoissa taloyhtiöissä järeämmät ja keskitetyt viilennysratkaisut kannattaa kytkeä osaksi muita suuria korjaushankkeita, jolloin toteutus on huomattavasti edullisempaa ja vaivattomampaa. Jos kerrostalossa on ajankohtaista siirtyä maalämpöön, samassa yhteydessä on järkevää hyödyntää maaviilennystä, joka tarjoaa...

content: 主催者から一言 ポイント 京成バラ園散策 入場料1800円は各自負担願います。 集合場所 八千代緑が丘駅 解散場所 京成バラ園 婚活・恋活、趣味活友達作りに繋がる出会いを提供しております。 ◆男女比を調整しながら募集しております。 ◆スタッフの先導により、園内を散策いたします。 ◆参加者の人数次第ではグループで散策いただく場合もございます。 ◆スタートから終わりまで、スタッフも同行しますので、何かございましたらスタッフにお声がけください。 ◆カップリング・プロフィールカードの記入はございませんので、連絡先交換は自由です。 気に入った方がおりましたら連絡先を交換しておいてください。 ◆ノーバッティングシステム 会いたくない方がおりましたら調整いたします。 ◆集合場所は八千代緑が丘駅集合になります。 八千代緑が丘駅集合後、徒歩15分(約1KM )でバラ園に到着 ◆イオン緑が丘店から徒歩15分で3時間駐車無料ですので、イオンに駐車しても良いと思います。京成バラ園の公式HPにもイオンにも駐車してくださいと記載されております。 ・電車でお越しになる場合は、最寄り駅は東葉高速鉄道の八千代緑が丘駅になります。 京成バラ園とは? 京成バラ園は、1600品種10000万株のバラが咲く関東最大級のバラ園です。 優秀庭園賞 京成バラ園は2015年に世界バラ会連合「優秀庭園賞」を受賞 集合場所 東葉高速鉄道 八千代緑が丘駅 改札を出て正面のくすりの福太郎付近にスタッフがお待ちしております。 最大人数・最少人数 ◆ナビスタは8年目、札幌・静岡・東京・千葉・埼玉・神奈川で開催 ◆1名様でご参加頂くお客様も毎回多数いらっしゃいます。 ほとんどの方が1名参加となりますので、1名でも気軽にご参加ください。 ◆男女比調整について ・男女半々の保証はしておりませんが、男女半々位になるよう調整はしております。 ・受け付けた場合でも、直前まで人数変動しますので、男女比調整で参加をお断りする場合もございます。 ◆ノーバッティングシステム ・参加したいのですが会いたくない人が居てまた会うのか不安 ・いろいろなパーティに参加していて、会いたくない人がいる ・会社の人と会いたくない 上記の相談は増えておりますので、 相手にわからないように調整させて頂いておりますので気軽にご相談ください。 ※ただし、開催直前では調整できない場合もございますので、開催1週間前までにご連絡頂ければありがたいです。 ◆最少開催人数 男性2名・女性2名になります。 ◆最大募集人数 男性10名・女性10名になります。 ※但し、企画により変動する場合がございます。 ◆開催人数につきましては、前月20人集まった企画でも、翌月6人くらいしか集まらないこともあり、集まり方は運営側も予測できない部分はございます。 楽しい会かどうかは、参加人数より、その時に参加される方の相性や人柄など要素が大きいです。 結局は、運次第のところはございます。 ◆最少催行人数に満たない場合は、開催前日23時までに最少催行人数に届かなかった場合は開催中止とさせていただきます。 また天候や状況などにより中止されることがございます。 ◆中止判断タイミングは開始前日の23時となりますが、申込者の直前のキャンセルにより、直前でも中止になる場合もございます。 中止時も交通費など保証はございません。 お申し込み状況 受付開始 時間厳守でお願いいたします。 八千代緑ヶ丘駅集合です 遅れる場合はご連絡ください。 イベントスタート! 自己紹介をして、1.0Kmほど徒歩で京成バラ園に向かいます。 京成バラ園まで徒歩 京成バラ園に到着したら、入園券は個々にお買い求めください。 入園券2000円別途かかります。 予定ではスタッフ先導で散策致します。 イベント終了 京成バラ園解散になります。 ランチは解散後、気になる方がおりましたら誘ってみてはいかがでしょうか?

Disney+ Developing An “Ella Enchanted” TV Series
content: Disney+ has reportedly begun development of a TV series adaptation fo the 2004 Anne Hathaway-led fairytale film “Ella Enchanted”. Hathaway is executive producing the potential series that will be written by Ilana Wolpert (“Anyone But You”), with Beth Schwartz (“Dead Boy Detectives”) as showrunner. The original film follows 16-year-old Ella of Frell – cursed at birth to obey every command – who is sent to boarding school after her mother’s untimely death. She begins to uncover the truth about her curse, builds an unlikely found family, and deals with an inconvenient crush on the prince of her kingdom. The series keeps the basic premise of the movie and the original Gail Carson Levine book, but will shift it away from its “Cinderella”-style trappings for more of a coming-of-age story in a boarding school setting (a reframing akin to “Wednesday”). Miramax Television and Paramount Television Studios are co-producing the series, while Johnathan Rice and Adam Shulman will also executive produce. Source: Deadline The post Disney+ Developing An “Ella Enchanted” TV Series appeared first on Dark Horizons .

content: أكسيوس: ترامب يدرس خيار ضرب إيران بالقنابل لهذا السبب حرب إيران، نقل موقع أكسيوس عن مسؤول في البيت الأبيض أن الإدارة الأمريكية ترى أن المقترح الإيراني المحدث لا يمثل تحسنًا جوهريًّا في مسار التفاوض مع إيران. تقييم أمريكي سلبي للمقترح الإيراني وبحسب المسؤول، فإن واشنطن لا تعتبر الطرح الإيراني الجديد خطوة كافية لتقريب وجهات النظر أو دفع المفاوضات نحو اتفاق نهائي، في ظل استمرار الخلافات حول الملفات الأساسية. فجوة مستمرة في مسار التفاوض بين أمريكا وإيران وأشار المصدر إلى أن الفجوة بين الجانبين لا تزال كبيرة، خاصة في ما يتعلق بالملف النووي والعقوبات الاقتصادية، ما يجعل فرص التوصل إلى اتفاق في المدى القريب غير محسومة. ترامب يدرس استئناف الحرب ضد إيران كما نقل أكسيوس عن مسؤولين أمريكيين، تأكيدهما بأن الرئيس الأمريكي دونالد ترامب يدرس استئناف الحرب لرفض إيران مطالب له وامتناعها عن التنازل بشأن النووي. يتوقع أن يعقد ترامب اجتماعًا مع فريق الأمن القومي غدًا الثلاثاء لنقاش خيارات عسكرية. أمريكا تلوح بالخيار العسكري ضد إيران وأكد مسؤول أمريكي رفيع لأكسيوس: سنضطر إلى مواصلة المفاوضات عبر القنابل إذا لم تغير إيران موقفها، مشيرًا إلى أن مقترح إيران المضاد الذي قدمته باكستان لنا مساء الأحد لا يتضمن سوى تحسينات شكلية. ولفت المسؤول الأمريكي إلى أن آخر مقترحات طهران تضمن عبارات بشأن التزامها بعدم السعي لامتلاك سلاح نووي، ولا يتضمن التزامًا تفصيليًّا بتعليق تخصيب اليورانيوم أو تسليم مخزونها الحالي. وتابع: أي تخفيف للعقوبات لن يحدث مجانًا دون خطوات متبادلة من جانب إيران. وأكد المسؤول الأمريكي لأكسيوس: لا نحرز تقدمًا كبيرًا ونحن في وضع حرج وعلى إيران ضغط كبير للرد بالطريقة الصحيحة.

Fora da Copa Paulista, Rio Claro confirma início do planejamento para 2027
content: Rio Claro, SP, 18 (AFI) – A temporada de 2026 terminou antes do esperado para o Rio Claro FC, eliminado nas quartas de final da Série A3 do Campeonato Paulista. Mas os bastidores do Azulão estão longe do silêncio. Sem jogos oficiais e fora da Copa Paulista, o clube já virou a chave para 2027 com um único objetivo: o acesso. O presidente Clayton Vieira revelou que a diretoria antecipou o planejamento e já monitora o mercado de atletas para montar um elenco competitivo. “Aproveitamos esse período sem competições para estruturar o clube e não perder tempo. Temos profissionais de análise de mercado trabalhando intensamente na captação de atletas, visando a Série A3 de 2027”, afirmou o mandatário. O foco total no acesso reflete a necessidade do clube, que completou 117 anos de história em 9 de maio, de apagar a marca do rebaixamento sofrido em 2025 para a terceira divisão estadual. COMISSÃO TÉCNICA EM ABERTO Se a busca por atletas já começou nos bastidores, as definições sobre o comando técnico e a gerência de futebol permanecem em compasso de espera. Em 2026, o Rio Claro FC foi dirigido por Alberto Félix, com Marcos Campagnollo atuando na gerência de futebol. A dupla conduziu o time até as quartas de final, quando o sonho do acesso imediato foi interrompido. Clayton Vieira tratou de deixar claro que a continuidade dos profissionais ainda não está garantida para o próximo ciclo. “Isso será definido mais adiante”, declarou o dirigente, sinalizando que novas reuniões internas devem ocorrer antes de qualquer anúncio oficial. A tendência é que o clube avalie com calma o perfil ideal para liderar o projeto de reconstrução na Série A3. PILAR DA GESTÃO Sem a Copa Paulista no calendário do segundo semestre, o Rio Claro FC terá meses exclusivamente dedicados ao planejamento e à estruturação do departamento de futebol. A meta de retornar à Série A2 tornou-se o pilar central da gestão de Clayton Vieira, que aposta em um trabalho de prospecção detalhada para não repetir os erros que culminaram na queda em 2025. O mercado da Série A3 costuma se movimentar com força apenas no segundo semestre, mas o Azulão quer largar na frente dos concorrentes. A ideia é chegar ao início da pré-temporada com a espinha dorsal do elenco já definida, permitindo ao treinador — seja ele Alberto Félix ou um novo nome — tempo hábil para implantar sua filosofia de jogo. “Nosso torcedor pode ter certeza de que o trabalho é ininterrupto....

title: Shakira le ganó a Hacienda de España: ¡Le tiene que devolver 60 millones de euros!
content: La cantante Shakira va a recuperar el dineral que le había sacado Hacienda de España durante su estadía en ese país siendo pareja de Piqué. Ella no se quedó con los brazos cruzados, recurrió a la Justicia y ganó el juicio después de varios años de disputa. Según la sentencia, la artista no cometió fraude fiscal ya que no residió en España durante el año 2011. Ante esta decisión, el fisco todavía puede recurrir ante el Tribunal Supremo con una apelación. La sentencia ordena que Hacienda le devuelva 60 millones de euros. A Shakira le habían sacado 55 millones, pero 5 millones serían los intereses. La Ley española establece que si una persona residió más de 183 días en un año en ese país debe pagar impuestos por el ejercicio fiscal del año. Pero la Justicia certificó que la estancia en territorio español de Shakira fue de 163 días y que la Administración no probó, por tanto, que la cantante tuviera el núcleo de intereses económicos en España y las relaciones familiares con residentes en ese país en los términos establecidos en el mencionado artículo. “Que Bahamas sea o no un paraíso fiscal en 2011 es irrelevante, porque la recurrente ha probado la permanencia de al menos 183 fuera de España (lo cual no es discutido)”. La entrada Shakira le ganó a Hacienda de España: ¡Le tiene que devolver 60 millones de euros! se publicó primero en Popular .

Real Madrid oficializa a saída de Dani Carvajal: 'Lenda do clube'
content: Espanha - Ídolo, Carvajal está de saída do Real Madrid. O anúncio veio através de um comunicado oficial do clube merengue nesta segunda-feira (18), e o lateral-direito de 34 anos receberá uma homenagem especial no Santiago Bernabéu no último jogo da equipe na temporada, no próximo sábado (23), contra o Athletic Bilbao. Revelado pelo time espanhol, o defensor chegou às categorias de base do Real Madrid em 2002. Em 2012, foi vendido ao Bayer Leverkusen, mas retornou no ano seguinte. Ao todo, atuou em 450 jogos pela equipe profissional dos Merengues, marcou 14 gols e distribuiu 65 assistências. Leia mais: Jogador da seleção espanhola sofre fratura e está fora da Copa do Mundo Carvajal esteve presente na era de ouro do Real Madrid e conquistou seis Ligas dos Campeões, sendo peça importante nas campanhas. Na última conquista continental do clube espanhol, o lateral-direito fez o primeiro gol da vitória por 2 a 0 sobre o Borussia Dortmund, na decisão de 2024. Nos últimos anos, o defensor conviveu com problemas físicos e perdeu espaço no elenco. Na atual temporada, disputou 22 jogos, sendo nove como titular, e não teve participações em gols. Confira o comunicado oficial do Real Madrid: O Real Madrid C. F. e nosso capitão Dani Carvajal chegaram a um acordo para encerrar uma etapa maravilhosa como jogador do nosso clube ao final da presente temporada. O Real Madrid deseja expressar sua gratidão e todo o carinho a uma das maiores lendas do nosso clube e do futebol mundial. Carvajal é um dos cinco jogadores que, ao longo de toda a história do futebol, conseguiram conquistar 6 Copas da Europa, e fez parte de uma equipe que protagonizou uma das épocas mais brilhantes da nossa história. Ele chegou ao Real Madrid no ano de 2002 e defendeu nossa camisa durante 23 temporadas: 10 na base e 13 no time principal, com o qual conquistou 27 títulos: 6 Copas da Europa, 6 Mundiais de Clubes, 5 Supercopas da Europa, 4 Ligas, 2 Copas do Rei e 4 Supercopas da Espanha. No âmbito individual, Carvajal foi incluído no Onze Mundial do FIFpro 2024, conquistou o prêmio The Best para o Onze Masculino da FIFA 2024 e foi eleito o Melhor jogador da final da Champions 2024, na qual marcou um gol. Carvajal disputou 450 partidas com nossa equipe, nas quais marcou 14 gols. Pela seleção da Espanha, jogou 51 partidas, sendo campeão da Eurocopa em 2024 e da Liga das Nações em 2023. Para o presidente do Real Madrid, Florentino Pérez, “Dani Carvajal é uma...

Musk loses case against OpenAI
content: Elon Musk waited too long to sue OpenAI and its leaders, a jury in Oakland, California, decided on Monday. A lawsuit he filed was barred by the statute of limitations, the jury found after about 90 minutes of deliberation. Their verdict was advisory, but Judge Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers said she agrees with the jury. “The court now confirms the prior indication that it would accept the jury’s findings as its own,” Rogers said. “I think that there’s a substantial amount of evidence to support the jury’s finding, which is why I was prepared to dismiss on the spot,” she added in court on Monday. Musk’s case threatened to derail the ChatGPT maker as it planned what could be a blockbuster IPO. The jury’s decision is a win for OpenAI and its founders, Altman and Brockman. OpenAI’s attorneys argued the company’s mission hasn’t changed, that it’s still run by a non-profit foundation board, and that Musk waited to file the suit until he founded his own competing artificial intelligence company, xAI. The jury agreed, finding that Musk was aware of the behavior discussed in the lawsuit as early as 2021. “The finding of the jury confirms that what this lawsuit was was a hypocritical attempt to sabotage a competitor,” William Savitt, OpenAI’s attorney, said on Monday. “The fact is that OpenAI is a not-for-profit, mission-driven organization that has been and will continue to be faithful to that mission.” OpenAI’s attorneys also claimed that Musk’s donations did not come with a commitment to stay a nonprofit and that the Tesla CEO at various points pushed for OpenAI to create a for-profit entity to compete with Google. They also said Musk tried to gain control of the for-profit entity and left the company when he failed to do so. Musk asked the court to force OpenAI to pay back more than $130 billion to OpenAI’s nonprofit arm, remove Altman and Brockman from their leadership roles and unwind the corporate restructuring that turned OpenAI into one of the world’s most valuable tech companies. OpenAI cofounder Ilya Sutskever and Shivon Zilis, an executive at Musk’s companies, former OpenAI board member and mother of four of Musk’s children, were among the high-profile witnesses who testified. Hundreds of pages worth of private emails, text messages and internal meeting notes were submitted as evidence, including Brockman’s personal diaries, and texts between Musk and Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg discussing possibly trying to buy OpenAI together. The trial revealed Google’s role...

Wheel and b.well Connected Health to Launch AI-First Virtual Care Infrastructure
content: Wheel x b. well What You Should Know Strategic Collaboration: Wheel and b.well Connected Health have announced a strategic partnership to create a turnkey infrastructure for AI-native and consumer-driven healthcare experiences. Platform Integration: The collaboration integrates b.well’s consumer health data and access infrastructure with Wheel’s Horizon platform, which handles clinical delivery and nationwide clinician operations. Overcoming the Action Wall: The combined offering addresses the operational bottleneck in virtual care where data records or AI answers fail to translate into actual clinical visits, prescriptions, or follow-ups. Initial Availability: Initial availability is expected through Wheel Clinic, which is currently featured in Walmart’s Better Care Services marketplace. Clinical Scope: The infrastructure supports scalable B2B and DTC virtual care programs across cardiometabolic health, GLP-1 care, women’s health, primary care, urgent care, and emerging Medicare Bridge models. Modern healthcare is flooded with data from wearables, retail pharmacies, and digital health interfaces, yet possessing a health record is not the same as receiving care. Wheel and b.well are addressing this “Action Gap” by linking longitudinal health context directly to a clinical delivery layer. This partnership allows organizations—including retailers, payers, and life sciences companies—to move from patient insight to clinical execution without building a full technology stack from scratch. Michelle Davey, CEO of Wheel, noted that the winners in the consumer health race will be the companies that can turn health context into “clinical action, pharmacy access, and outcomes”. Closing the Loop: Data Refinery to Clinical Action Historically, the patient journey has been fragmented across disconnected systems, leading to administrative confusion and a “guessing game” for consumers navigating portals and clinicians. The Wheel and b.well infrastructure is designed to bring these disparate pieces into a single, modular flow: Longitudinal Records: b.well cleanses and standardizes fragmented data through its proprietary Data Refinery using FHIR® standards. Consumer-Authorized Access: The platform provides identity matching, consent management, and semantic interoperability. The Clinical Action Layer: Wheel provides the nationwide clinician network, prescribing workflows, and patient support. Pharmacy Coordination: The infrastructure supports real-time pharmacy workflows...

La jugada del día: resultados de La Antioqueñita Día y Tarde de este lunes, 18 de mayo de 2026
content: Entre los juegos de azar más conocidos de Colombia se destaca La Antioqueñita , una lotería que realiza dos sorteos diarios y se ha convertido en una opción popular para quienes sueñan con ganar premios millonarios. Tal como lo indica su nombre, es el juego emblemático del departamento de Antioquia y cada día reúne a miles de apostadores que confían en la suerte con la esperanza de cambiar su vida. En el sorteo número 6505 de la Antioqueñita Día de este lunes, 18 de mayo, el número ganador fue 2939 , junto con la balota denominada ‘La Quinta’, número 2 . Resultados del sorteo 6505 – La Antioqueñita Día Número ganador: 2939 Quinta balota: 2 Si en esta ocasión la suerte no estuvo de su lado, puede intentarlo nuevamente en la edición de la tarde. Este sorteo se realiza todos los días a las 4:00 p. m., incluidos domingos y festivos. Resultados del sorteo 6506 – La Antioqueñita Tarde Número ganador: pendiente Quinta balota: pendiente Para conocer los resultados en tiempo real, los participantes pueden seguir las transmisiones en vivo a través del canal de YouTube La Red Gana , donde es posible conocer al instante cuáles fueron las combinaciones favorecidas. El próximo sorteo de La Antioqueñita está previsto para realizarse el martes 19 de mayo en sus respectivos horarios, según la lotería.

Ramaphosa urges private sector to unlock R1.8 trillion reserves
content: South Africa is seeing a steady conversion of investment pledges into real economic activity and jobs, according to President Cyril Ramaphosa, who says recent investment conferences are delivering tangible results across multiple sectors. In a weekly letter released on Monday, 18 May 2026, Ramaphosa said the country’s investment drive has moved beyond ‘ just for show’ , arguing that engagements with investors are increasingly translating into factories, infrastructure and employment. Ramaphosa pointed to a series of high-level engagements this year, including the sixth South Africa Investment Conference in March and an Infrastructure Investment Summit hosted by global asset manager BlackRock, as key platforms attracting capital. ‘Since we launched our first national investment drive in 2018, we have attracted investments in energy, telecoms, infrastructure, automotive, mining, advanced manufacturing and many other sectors,’ he said. He added that of the R1.5 trillion in investment pledges made since 2018, about R634 billion has already been deployed into the economy, funding projects such as factories, mines, data centres and power plants. Investment is a long-term commitment. Moving from pledges to large-scale growth and employment creation takes time, particularly in sectors where projects take years to reach implementation. https://t.co/qxNz69j6QZ pic.twitter.com/NQZ7s8wZ0V — Cyril Ramaphosa (@CyrilRamaphosa) May 18, 2026 Among the cited examples were BMW’s R4.2 billion investment to electrify its Rosslyn plant, Tetra Pak’s R500 million upgrade in KwaZulu-Natal, Corobrik’s R500 million brick plant project in Gauteng, and the Newlyn PX terminal at the Port of Durban. Ramaphosa also highlighted the Ivanplats Platreef mine in Mokopane, which stemmed from a R2.8 billion investment pledge, as a case of commitments turning into operational projects. He said investment is also supporting skills development, citing Microsoft’s partnership with the Youth Employment Service to expand artificial intelligence training, as part of its broader R5.4 billion expansion in South Africa. Despite the progress, the President warned that investment levels remain below target. Gross fixed capital formation currently stands at around 14% of GDP, far below the National Development Plan’s 30% target for 2030. Greater investment He noted that investment had previously peaked at around 21% in 2008 but declined due to the global financial crisis and the impact of state capture on...

title: Αποδεκατίζεται η Αστυνομία στην Αιτωλοακαρνανία – 30 αποσπάσεις αστυνομικών σε νησιά
content: Αποδεκατίζεται η Αστυνομία στην Αιτωλοακαρνανία, καθώς οι αποσπάσεις αστυνομικών προς νησιωτικές και τουριστικές περιοχές για την κάλυψη αυξημένων αναγκών της θερινής περιόδου οδηγούν σε περαιτέρω αποδυνάμωση των τοπικών αστυνομικών υπηρεσιών. Για μια ακόμη φορά φέτος ενόψει των αναγκών της τουριστικής περιόδου και των ελλείψεων σε προσωπικό που παρατηρούνται στις αστυνομικές υπηρεσίες των νησιών αποψιλώνονται οι αστυνομικές υπηρεσίες από διάφορες περιοχές της ηπειρωτικής Ελλάδας για να καλυφθούν οι ανάγκες των νησιών και άλλων τουριστικών περιοχών της χώρας. «Αφαίμαξη» υφίστανται οι Αστυνομικές Διευθύνσεις της Δυτικής Ελλάδας με περισσότερους από 50 αστυνομικούς από την Αχαΐα , την Ηλεία και την Αιτωλοακαρνανία να μετακινούνται σε νησιά του Αιγαίου και του Ιονίου. Ενδεικτικά μπορεί να αναφέρει κανείς ότι με μετακινούμενους αστυνομικούς από διάφορες περιοχές η Κεφαλονιά και η Ιθάκη ενισχύθηκαν συνολικά με 19 αστυνομικούς, ενώ η Αστυνομική Διεύθυνση Χανίων με 45 αστυνομικούς. Με αποστάσεις τρίμηνης ή εξάμηνης –κατά περίπτωση- διάρκειας αστυνομικοί και από την Αιτωλοακαρνανία έλαβαν «φύλλα πορείας» για τα νησιά. Σύμφωνα με πληροφορίες της “Συνείδησης” 18 αποσπάστηκαν από την Αστυνομική Διεύθυνση Ακαρνανίας στο Αγρίνιο και 11 από την Αστυνομική Διεύθυνση Αιτωλίας στο Μεσολόγγι. Μάλιστα δεν αποκλείεται ο αριθμός αυτός να αυξηθεί το επόμενο διάστημα. Υπενθυμίζεται ότι το χειμώνα με τις τακτικές μεταθέσεις είχε ανακοινωθεί η ενίσχυση των υπηρεσιών του νομού με 20 αστυνομικούς, όμως τώρα έφυγαν σχεδόν 30, οπότε εύκολα αντιλαμβάνεται κανείς ότι η υποστελέχωση βαίνει επί τα χείρω... Αυτή η κατάσταση έρχεται να προστεθεί στα ήδη υπάρχοντα προβλήματα υποστελέχωσης των αστυνομικών υπηρεσιών της Αιτωλοακαρνανίας και να θέσει επιπλέον ερωτηματικά για την ικανότητα αποτελεσματικής αστυνόμευσης. Πρόσφατα για παράδειγμα η Ένωση Αστυνομικών Υπαλλήλων Αιτωλίας κατήγγειλε ότι οι αστυνομικοί καλούνται να επωμιστούν τις συνέπειες ενός ελλιπούς υπηρεσιακού σχεδιασμού, με εξάντληση και σημαντικό προσωπικό κόστος και υπογράμμισε ότι με τις συνεχόμενες υπηρεσίες, στις οποίες υποχρεώνονται οι αστυνομικοί παραβιάζεται το προβλεπόμενο πλαίσιο που απαγορεύει τη διάθεση αστυνομικού προσωπικού σε υπηρεσία δύο φορές μέσα στο ίδιο 24ωρο. Σύμφωνα με την Ένωση Αστυνομικών Υπαλλήλων...

title: महेंद्रसिंह धोनीचा आयपीएल प्रवास थांबला? चेपॉकवरील फोटोग्राफीनंतर चर्चांना उधाण
content: आयपीएल स्पर्धेच्या इतिहासात सर्वात यशस्वी ठरलेल्या चेन्नई सुपर किंग्सचा कर्णधार महेंद्रसिंह धोनीने निवृत्ती जाहीर केल्याची चर्चा रंगली आहे. पण अधिकृतरित्या कुठेच काहीच सांगितलेलं नाही. पण चेपॉक मैदानातील फोटोग्राफीमुळे तशी चर्चा रंगली आहे. चेन्नई सुपर किंग्सने महेंद्रसिंह धोनीच्या नेतृत्वात पाच वेळा जेतेपद मिळवलं आहे. त्यामुळे चेन्नई सुपर किंग्स आणि धोनी एक समीकरण आहे. 2021 पासून त्याच्या निवृत्तीची चर्चा होती. त्याने 2021 ला एक इच्छाही व्यक्त केली होती. चेपॉकवर शेवटचा सामना खेळण्याची इच्छा व्यक्त केली होती. पण तसं काही झालं नाही. आयपीएल 2026 स्पर्धेत सुरूवातीपासूनच त्याला खेळता आलं नाही. दुखापतीमुळे या स्पर्धेत एकही सामना खेळला नाही. सनरायझर्स हैदराबादविरुद्ध घरच्या मैदानावर चेन्नई सुपर किंग्सचा शेवटचा सामना होता. या सामन्यात महेंद्रसिंह धोनी खेळेल अशी अपेक्षा होती. मात्र या स्पर्धेलाही मुकला. पण पहिला डाव संपला आणि धोनीसोबत फोटोसेशन झालं. त्यामुळे या सामन्यानंतर निवृत्ती घेतली असं सोशल मीडियावर चर्चासत्र रंगलं आहे. पहिल्या डावानंतर महेंद्रसिंह धोनी फोटोशूटसाठी मैदानात उतरला. चेन्नई सुपर किंग्सचा घरच्या मैदानातील 19 व्या मोसमातील शेवटचा सामना असल्याने मैदानात आला. या सामन्यापूर्वी आर अश्विन आणि मोहम्मद कैफने हा शेवटचा सामना असेल असा अंदाज व्यक्त केला होता. पण तसं काही झालं नाही. त्यामुळे धोनी सामन्याच्या निकालानंतर निवृत्ती निर्णय जाहीर करेल, असा अंदाज वर्तवण्यात येत होता. मात्र तसंही झालं नाही. मात्र तो धोनी आहे. त्याने याआधी आंतरराष्ट्रीय क्रिकेटमध्ये कुणालाही कल्पना नसताना निवृत्ती जाहीर केली होती. त्यामुळे धोनी सामन्यानंतर निवृत्तीबाबत काही अपडेट देतो का? याकडे क्रिकेट चाहत्यांचं लक्ष असणार आहे. महेंद्रसिंह धोनीचं आयपीएल करिअर महेंद्रसिंह धोनी आयपीएल स्पर्धेत 278 सामने खेळला आहे. त्याने 38.3 च्या सरासरीने 5439 धावा केल्या आहेत. धोनी आपल्या क्रिकेट कारकि‍र्दीत 24 अर्धशतकं ठोकली आहेत. तसेच 264 षटकार मारले आहेत. आतापर्यंत 18 पर्वात महेंद्रसिंह धोनी खेळला. पण 19व्या पर्वात त्याला काही मैदानात उतरता आलं नाही. महेंद्रसिंह धोनीने मागच्या पर्वात चेन्नई सुपर किंग्सचं नेतृत्व केलं होतं. पण यावेळेस मैदानात उतरलाच नाही.

title: Former Jaguars coach Urban Meyer loses arbitration case against NFL team, AP source says
Memorial Day safety tips from local law enforcement and first responders
content: CULLMAN, Ala. – With Memorial Day approaching, the Cullman County Sheriff’s Office, Cullman Police Department and Cullman Fire Rescue would like to remind the residents of Cullman County to be proactive and safe as summer approaches. Cullman Police Chief Joey Duncan said he wants to remind everyone to stay mindful of safety hazards this summer. “This year’s Fourth of July is especially significant as we celebrate 250 years of our nation’s independence,” Duncan said. “These holidays are a time to gather with family and friends, but they also bring an increase in vehicle crashes and preventable incidents. Impaired driving is a serious issue during holiday weekends. If you plan to drink, please make arrangements for a sober driver or alternative transportation. We will have additional patrol officers on duty specifically focused on impaired driving enforcement to help keep our roads safe.” Duncan said with more people traveling, traffic will be heavier than usual. “Please be patient, avoid distractions and always wear your seatbelt,” Duncan said. “The summer heat can also create dangerous conditions. Stay hydrated and never leave children or pets in a vehicle, even for a short time. Simple precautions can prevent serious injuries. Our goal is for everyone in our community to enjoy the holiday and return home safely.” Cullman Fire Rescue Chief Darren Peeples said Memorial Day marks the unofficial start of summer — a time for backyard barbecues, camping trips and gatherings with family and friends. “While it’s a day of remembrance, it’s also one of the busiest outdoor cooking holidays of the year,” Peeples said. “Unfortunately, that also means a higher risk of fires and related injuries. A few simple precautions can make the difference between a safe celebration and a dangerous situation.” Suggestions Peeples shared: Grill safely and smartly Outdoor grilling is a Memorial Day staple, but it’s also a leading cause of home fires during warm-weather holidays. Always place grills at least 10 feet away from your home, deck railings and overhanging branches. Never use grills indoors or in enclosed spaces like garages. Keep a close eye on the grill at all times — unattended cooking is a major cause of fires. If you’re using a gas grill, check hoses for leaks before lighting. For charcoal grills, use only approved starter fluids and never add them to an already lit fire. Manage open flames carefully Fire pits and campfires add atmosphere, but they come with risks....

أبطال «عنبر الموت» يستكملون تصوير مشاهدهم الخارجية بالإسكندرية
content: يستكمل أبطال وصناع مسلسل " عنبر الموت " بطولة النجمة منة شلبي تصوير باقي مشاهدهم الخارجية ابتداء من 20 يونيو المقبل بمدينة الإسكندرية حيث يستعد فريق عمل مسلسل " عنبر الموت " للسفر للاسكندرية 20 يونيو المقبل ، من أجل استئناف تصوير مشاهدهم المتبقية في المسلسل . مسلسل “عنبر الموت” من تأليف مريم نعوم وإخراج كريم الشناوي، بطولة منة شلبي، علي قاسم، رشدي الشامي، بسمة، حليم الجندي، وبدأ صناع العمل تصوير أولى مشاهد المسلسل يناير الماضي. والعمل ينتمي إلى نوعية المسلسلات القصيرة، ومن المقرر عرضه في الـoff season على منصة شاهد. وشاركت منة شلبي في بطولة مسلسل " صحاب الأرض " بموسم رمضان الماضي 2026 ولاقى العمل نجاحا مميزا . فقدمت دور دكتورة مصرية تسافر إلى غزة من أجل مساعدة المصابين جراء الحرب، لتلتقي بـإياد نصار وتعيش معه رحلة مؤلمة بسبب الحرب أثناء علاجها لابن شقيقه. المسلسل ضم 15 حلقة، وتدور أحداثه حول ما يحدث في غزة بعد حرب 7 أكتوبر، من تأليف عمار صبري، وإخراج بيتر ميمي، وعرض على شاشات المتحدة ومنصة WATCH IT خلال النصف الأول من شهر رمضان الماضي.
creator: أحمد حمدي

title: Xi Jinping's 'Thucydides Trap' warning: Is China outsmarting the US without engaging in actual conflict?
IPL 2026: CSK vs SRH ঘরের মাঠে চেন্নাইকে হারিয়ে প্লেঅফে হায়দরাবাদ, দলের সঙ্গে ধোনির ফটোশুট দেখে আবেগে ভাসল চিপক
content: গোটা বছরের এই একটা সময়ের অপেক্ষায় থাকেন ক্রিকেটপ্রেমীরা। কারণ সারা বছরে শুধু এই আইপিএলেই নস্ট্যালজিয়ায় ভাসার সুযোগ মেলে। সৌজন্যে ২২ গজ জুড়ে মহেন্দ্র সিং ধোনির দাপট। হেলিকপ্টার শট, উইকেটের পিছনে দাঁড়িয়ে রিভিউ নেওয়ার চেনা ছবি। সেই ছবি এ মরশুমে এখনও পর্যন্ত দেখার সৌভাগ্যই হয়নি থালা ফ্যানদের। চোটের কবলে পড়ে বারবার পিছিয়েছে তাঁর মাঠে নামার তারিখ। তবে সোমবার চিপকে প্রথম একাদশে না থাকলেও দলের সঙ্গে মাঠে দেখা গেল ক্যাপ্টেন কুলকে। আর তাতেই কৌতূহল, তবে কি এটাই তাঁর শেষ আইপিএল? ১৮ মে। চিপকে এদিনই ছিল চেন্নাইয়ের শেষ ম্যাচ। এদিনই হয়তো অবসর নিতে পারেন ধোনি। এমনই জল্পনা ছিল তুঙ্গে। আর খানিকটা অপ্রত্যাশিতভাবে ধোনিকে মাঠে দেখে সেই জল্পনাতেই ঘৃতাহুতি পড়ে। চলতি মরশুমে এই প্রথমবার দলের সঙ্গে সফর করলেন এমএস। শুধু ড্রেসিংরুমে বসে খেলাই দেখলেন না, চেন্নাই ইনিংস শেষ হতে সতীর্থদের সঙ্গে মাঠেও এলেন। হল ফটোশুট। স্টেডিয়াম জুড়ে যেন তখন আবেগের বন্যা। সাধারণত, যে কোনও দলই ঘরের মাঠে নিজেদের শেষ ম্যাচে ফটোশুট করে থাকে। তবু অনুরাগীদের শঙ্কা, আর হলুদ জার্সিতে ব্যাট হাতে হয়তো দেখা যাবে না ধোনিকে। হয়তো অন্য কোনও ভূমিকায়! উত্তর অধরা। তবে দিনের শেষে ধোনির মুখে হাসি ফোটাতে ব্যর্থ রুতুরাজরা। তাঁকে জয় উপহার দিতে পারল না সিএসকে। এদিন টস জিতে প্রথমে ব্যাটিংয়ের সিদ্ধান্ত নেন চেন্নাই অধিনায়ক রুতুরাজ গায়কোয়াড়। তবে প্যাট কামিন্স ও শাকিব হুসেনের দাপটে জোর ধাক্কা খায় পাঁচবারের চ্যাম্পিয়নদের টপ অর্ডার। কঠিন সময়ে সঞ্জু স্যামসন শক্ত হাতে হাল ধরলেই জয়ের মুখ দেখেছে চেন্নাই। কিন্তু এদিন তিনি ফেরেন ২৭ রান করে। কার্তিক শর্মা আর ব্রেভিসের ব্যাট থেকে আসে যথাক্রমে ৩২ ও ৪৪ রান। ৭ উইকেটে ১৮০ রানে শেষ হয় চেন্নাইয়ের ইনিংস। কামিন্স একাই তুলে নেন তিনটি উইকেট। আর এদিনও ঈশান কিষানের ঈর্ষণীয় ফর্মের কাছে কুপোকাত হলেন বিপক্ষ বোলাররা। জয়ের দোরগাড়ায় পৌঁছে ৭০ রানের মূল্যবান ইনিংস খেলে প্যাভিলিয়নে ফেরেন তিনি। ৪৭ রানে হেনরিক ক্লাসেনকে আউট করে ম্যাচের মোড় ঘোরানোর চেষ্টা করেছিল চেন্নাই। কিন্তু শেষরক্ষা হয়নি। আর এই জয়ের সৌজন্যেই ১৬ পয়েন্ট নিয়ে প্লেঅফে পৌঁছে গেল সানরাইজার্স হায়দরাবাদ। চেন্নাই হারায় প্লেঅফের টিকিট নিশ্চিত করে ফেলল গুজরাট টাইটান্সও। তাদের ঝুলিতেও ১৬ পয়েন্ট। ইতিমধ্যেই ১৮ পয়েন্ট নিয়ে শীর্ষে বসে রয়েছে আরসিবি। অর্থাৎ প্লেঅফের একটি স্থান নিয়েই এবার বাকি লড়াই। চেন্নাইয়ের পথ পুরোপুরি বন্ধ না হলেও অত্যন্ত কঠিন। পরের ম্যাচে শুধু রুতুরাজরা জিতলেই চলবে না, পাঞ্জাব, রাজস্থানের ফলাফলের উপরও নির্ভর করতে হবে তাঁদের। তবে ম্যাচের হাফ টাইমে ধোনিকে সামনে থেকে পাওয়াই এদিন চিপকের একমাত্র পাওনা হয়ে রইল।

title: Putin fik sin parade, og så ville han vise tænder. Det gik slet ikke som planlagt
Clubes do ES, do Brasil e Seleção Brasileira homenageiam Geovani Silva
content: Geovani com a camisa da Seleção Brasileira no Kleber Andrade (Foto: Pedro Valle/CBF) A morte do ex-jogador Geovani Silva , um dos maiores ídolos da história do Vasco da Gama e referência do futebol capixaba, provocou uma onda de homenagens de clubes do Espírito Santo , do futebol brasileiro e da Seleção Brasileira. Conhecido como “Pequeno Príncipe” , Geovani morreu na madrugada desta segunda-feira (18), aos 62 anos. Ele passou mal durante a madrugada, foi socorrido e levado a um hospital, mas não resistiu, apesar das tentativas de reanimação da equipe médica. Diante da notícia da morte, Geovani recebeu homenagens de diversos clubes do futebol capixaba e nacional. Durante sua trajetória, ele atuou em times como: Desportiva Ferroviária (ES), Vasco da Gama, Bologna (Itália) e Karlsruher SC (Alemanha). Geovani ainda vestiu a camisa de clubes do México, Alemanha e Itália antes de encerrar a carreira, em 2002. Veja algumas das homenagens Confederação Brasileira de Futebol (CBF) A Confederação Brasileira de Futebol (CBF) lamentou a morte do ex-jogador e destacou a trajetória construída com a camisa da Seleção Brasileira. Em nota, a CBF relembrou que Geovani foi medalhista de prata na Olimpíada de Seul, em 1988, campeão da Copa América de 1989 e também conquistou dois títulos nas categorias de base da Seleção em 1983, a Copa do Mundo Sub-20 e o Sul-Americano da mesma categoria. Vasco da Gama O Vasco da Gama também se manifestou nas redes sociais e classificou Geovani como um dos maiores ídolos da história do clube. A equipe destacou os 408 jogos e os 50 gols marcados pelo ex-meia com a camisa cruzmaltina. “O ‘Pequeno Príncipe’, como foi carinhosamente apelidado, chegou ao Vasco da Gama no início da década de 80 e fez história no meio-campo cruzmaltino” , escreveu o clube. Desportiva Ferroviária A Desportiva Ferroviária lamentou a morte de Geovani e relembrou a trajetória construída pelo ex-jogador no clube grená. A equipe destacou que o “Menino de Ouro”, revelado na base no fim da década de 1970, ganhou projeção internacional e teve passagem marcante pela Seleção Brasileira. O clube também ressaltou um feito histórico do ex-meia, que conquistou, no mesmo ano, os títulos estaduais nas categorias juvenil, júnior e profissional na década de 1980. Foto: @desportivaoficial/Instagram Rio Branco O Rio Branco ressaltou a trajetória construída por Geovani nas décadas de 1980 e 1990 e lembrou as passagens do...

أحمد سعد يحيي احتفالية فرحة مصر ويوجه الشكر للسيدة انتصار السيسي
content: أحيا المطرب أحمد سعد اليوم احتفالية " فرحة مصر " التي أقيمت برعاية السيدة انتصار السيسي قرينة الرئيس عبد الفتاح السيسي . وتأتي احتفالية " فرحة مصر " بمناسبة زفاف ألف عريس وعروس من شباب الجمهورية ، وقدم أحمد سعد في الحفل بعضا من أغانيه الشهيرة، أبرزها "إيه اليوم الحلو ده" و"مكسرات"، و"يا ابن المحظوظة" وسط تفاعل كبير من الحضور والأجواء الاحتفالية. كذلك حرص أحمد سعد على توجيه رسالة شكر خلال كلمته على المسرح، قبل ما أقول أي حاجة أحب أقول يا حبيبتي يا مصر، طبعًا كان ليا الفخر والشرف إني أكون موجود في مبادرة بتعملها بلدي الحبيبة، وأحلى عرسان في الدنيا. كما وجه الشكر للسيدة انتصار السيسي، قائلا : بنشكر السيدة انتصار السيسي، أمنا في الخير، وشكرًا جدًا على وجود حضرتك»، قبل أن يمازحها قائلًا: هنستأذن حضرتك العرسان يرقصوا عادي ، لتتعالى بعدها أجواء الفرح والتفاعل بين العرسان والحضور.
creator: أحمد حمدي

title: KDNP: Magyar Péter kérjen bocsánatot Sulyok Tamástól!
content: A Kereszténydemokrata Néppárt (KDNP) elvárja Magyar Péter miniszterelnöktől, hogy május 31-ig kérjen elnézést Sulyok Tamás köztársasági elnöktől. Rétvári Bence , a KDNP frakcióvezetője hétfői videoüzenetében az alaptörvényt idézte, miszerint a köztársasági elnök személye sérthetetlen. Ez az, amire Magyar Péter is letette az esküjét – mutatott rá. Megjegyezte: Magyar Péter két hete más sem tesz, mint folyamatosan fenyegeti, sértegeti a köztársasági elnököt. Itt az ideje, hogy Magyar Péter elnézést kérjen Sulyok Tamástól – fogalmazott a KDNP-s politikus, hozzátéve: várják május 31-ig Magyar Péter bocsánatkérését. Magyar Péter megválasztása óta többször jelezte, hogy szerinte Sulyok Tamásnak távoznia kellene, de a köztársasági elnök mai interjújában kifejtette, hogy ő másként gondolja. Kapcsolódó Sulyok Tamás nem mond le Az államfő egyetlen döntését sem bánta meg. (MTI) The post KDNP: Magyar Péter kérjen bocsánatot Sulyok Tamástól! first appeared on 24.hu .

Lakewood’s Colfax Corridor Heats Up as El Pollo Loco Lands by Casa Bonita
content: Lakewood’s stretch of West Colfax just got a little smokier. El Pollo Loco has opened a new restaurant at 6441 W. Colfax Ave., bringing the chain’s citrus-marinated, fire-grilled chicken to the busy Colfax corridor. The spot sits in the Lamar Station shopping center near the Casa Bonita complex and lists daily service hours starting at 10 a.m. On the menu are the chain’s familiar staples, including tacos, bowls, family meals and freshly made guacamole. As reported by 9News , the Lakewood restaurant is the chain’s fourth location in Colorado and was scheduled to open at 10 a.m. on Monday. El Pollo Loco’s store locator now lists the new Lakewood address and shows regular hours of 10 a.m. to 10 p.m., along with a local phone number for call-in orders. El Pollo Loco's Colorado Rollout The Lakewood launch is the latest move in El Pollo Loco’s Colorado rollout. The chain first returned to the state with a Denver outpost at 4698 Peoria St. in November 2022, as documented by Westword . The brand later added an Arvada location, then marked a growth milestone when it opened its 500th U.S. restaurant in October 2025, a step the company described in a press release as part of its push to expand beyond its California base. Location and Permits Public permit records show electrical and tenant-finish work at the Colfax address in 2025, consistent with converting an existing quick-service pad into the new restaurant. Property records for the Lamar Station Plaza describe the pad’s hard-corner spot on W. Colfax and reference Casa Bonita as a neighboring tenant, a combination that underscores the restaurant’s visibility along the corridor. In its growth announcement, the company framed recent openings as part of a broader effort to bring its fire-grilled menu to new markets and to deliver app-based promotions tied to grand openings. For Lakewood diners, the new outlet adds another quick-casual chicken option along a busy stretch of Colfax and slips neatly into the brand’s expanding Denver-area roster.

Daily Journal Athlete of the Week: Clifton Central’s Blake Chandler
content: Name: Blake Chandler School: Clifton Central Year: Senior Sport: Baseball Why he was selected: The Comets scored a sweep of River Valley Conference rival Momence May 5 and 7 by a combined 19-3. Chandler pitched the first game, a 12-2 five-inning win last Tuesday, allowing two earned runs on three hits, two walks and nine strikeouts. In the two-game slate, he was 3 for 5 with a home run, six RBIs and four runs. Can you describe the pride that comes with defending the River Valley Conference title? There is a lot of pride that comes with defending the RVC title. We felt like going back-to-back was a good goal going into the season especially since we didn’t lose a lot of parts from last season. So this is just one of our goals met for the season. You’ve lettered in four varsity sports in high school, quite a rare feat these days. What is the year-round grind like of being so active in so many sports? The year-round grind honestly can get pretty exhausting, but it’s all about staying in the right mindset all year and staying in the present. I love all the sports I play so I wouldn’t change a thing. But after four years of this it does definitely take a toll on your body. Which is your favorite sport and why? Or are you one of those kids whose favorite sport is whatever is in season? I would say I am one of those kids whose favorite sport is whichever one I’m playing. But if I had to choose one it would be basketball because of how close our team was and all the support we had from our community. It’s hard to top that feeling when the crater is packed. Do you have an accomplishment or a win that you’re most proud of this spring? I think the win I’m most proud of this spring is probably when I threw an eight-inning shutout at Gardner-South Wilmington to give us a big conference game win. I believe I recorded my 200th strikeout as well this year, so that’s a big accomplishment for me. Outside of sports, what other talents or hobbies do you have? Outside of sports, I have a few other talents and hobbies. I like to play card games with my family and playing bags. After being one of the smallest teams in Class 2A, the Comets are now in Class 1A and hosting a regional as the top seed. What has you and your teammates most excited for the postseason? We have to take things one game at a time first, but we are excited. Momence played us close and we split with St. Anne. Moving from 2A to 1A gets us out of the nearly impossible bracket, so that’s good news for us.
